title: UN World Population Prospects 2024 — Demographic Indicators (compact CSV, Medium variant)
source_org: UN Department of Economic and Social Affairs, Population Division
countries: ALL (world + regional aggregates); confirmed IRN present, 152 rows 1950-2100ish
units: described in file (thousands of persons, rates per 1000, years, etc.)
license_terms: UN DESA Population Division — free to use with attribution
notes: Compact 'Demographic Indicators' CSV, Medium variant, gzip-compressed. This is the flagship all-in-one indicator file from the WPP2024 download page. Only the Medium projection variant was pulled (the standard comparator use case); Low/High/Constant-fertility variants exist as separate files if needed later.
